nodes.description: Determine whether current medication includes an ACE inhibitor without assigning causation.

nodes.display: At work, are you exposed to dust, fumes, smoke, chemicals, or other things that irritate your breathing?
nodes.wording: At work, are you exposed to dust, fumes, smoke, chemicals, or other things that irritate your breathing?

nodes.display: Has anyone around you recently had a cold or similar symptoms?
nodes.wording: Has anyone around you recently had a cold or similar symptoms?

nodes.display: Have you had close contact with tuberculosis or another reason you may have been exposed to TB?
nodes.wording: Have you had close contact with tuberculosis or another reason you may have been exposed to TB?

nodes.display: Have you had repeated chest or sinus infections?
nodes.wording: Have you had repeated chest or sinus infections?

nodes.display: Are you taking a blood pressure or heart medicine called an ACE inhibitor?
nodes.wording: Are you taking a blood pressure or heart medicine called an ACE inhibitor?

nodes.display: Do you have a condition or take a treatment that weakens your immune system?
nodes.wording: Do you have a condition or take a treatment that weakens your immune system?

nodes.display: Do you currently smoke, did you smoke in the past, or have you never smoked?
nodes.wording: Do you currently smoke, did you smoke in the past, or have you never smoked?

nodes.display: Have you had any chest pain or discomfort?
nodes.wording: Have you had any chest pain or discomfort?

nodes.display: Does the cough tend to start or get worse after meals?
nodes.wording: Does the cough tend to start or get worse after meals?

nodes.display: Does cold air trigger or worsen the cough?
nodes.wording: Does cold air trigger or worsen the cough?

nodes.display: Does exercise or physical activity trigger or worsen the cough?
nodes.wording: Does exercise or physical activity trigger or worsen the cough?

nodes.display: Does the cough get worse when you lie down?
nodes.wording: Does the cough get worse when you lie down?

nodes.display: Does the cough wake you at night or tend to be worse overnight?
nodes.wording: Does the cough wake you at night or tend to be worse overnight?

nodes.display: Do you get prolonged or repeated fits of coughing?
nodes.wording: Do you get prolonged or repeated fits of coughing?

nodes.display: Did the cough begin very suddenly, for example during eating or after something went down the wrong way?
nodes.wording: Did the cough begin very suddenly, for example during eating or after something went down the wrong way?

nodes.display: Overall, is the cough improving, staying about the same, or getting worse?
nodes.wording: Overall, is the cough improving, staying about the same, or getting worse?

nodes.display: After a coughing fit, do you make a whooping sound when breathing in?
nodes.wording: After a coughing fit, do you make a whooping sound when breathing in?

nodes.display: How long have you had the cough?
nodes.wording: How long have you had the cough?

nodes.display: Have you had persistent or worsening difficulty swallowing?
nodes.wording: Have you had persistent or worsening difficulty swallowing?

nodes.display: Has your voice been persistently hoarse or changed when you speak?
nodes.wording: Has your voice been persistently hoarse or changed when you speak?

nodes.display: Have you felt short of breath or had trouble breathing?
nodes.wording: Have you felt short of breath or had trouble breathing?

nodes.display: Have you had a fever or felt feverish?
nodes.wording: Have you had a fever or felt feverish?

nodes.display: Do you get a burning feeling in your chest or upper stomach?
nodes.wording: Do you get a burning feeling in your chest or upper stomach?

nodes.display: Have you noticed any blood when you cough?
nodes.wording: Have you noticed any blood when you cough?

nodes.display: Have you been having drenching or unusual night sweats?
nodes.wording: Have you been having drenching or unusual night sweats?

nodes.display: When did the cough first start?
nodes.wording: When did the cough first start?

nodes.display: Do you feel mucus draining into your throat or need to clear your throat often?
nodes.wording: Do you feel mucus draining into your throat or need to clear your throat often?

nodes.display: Do you notice sour or bitter fluid coming back into your throat or mouth?
nodes.wording: Do you notice sour or bitter fluid coming back into your throat or mouth?

nodes.display: Have you had a runny or blocked nose?
nodes.wording: Have you had a runny or blocked nose?

nodes.display: Have you been sneezing more than usual?
nodes.wording: Have you been sneezing more than usual?

nodes.display: Have you had a sore or scratchy throat?
nodes.wording: Have you had a sore or scratchy throat?

nodes.display: Are you bringing up any phlegm or mucus when you cough?
nodes.wording: Are you bringing up any phlegm or mucus when you cough?

nodes.display: Apart from the cough, how unwell do you feel overall?
nodes.wording: Apart from the cough, how unwell do you feel overall?

nodes.display: Have you lost weight without trying?
nodes.wording: Have you lost weight without trying?

nodes.display: Have you noticed any wheezing or a whistling sound when breathing?
nodes.wording: Have you noticed any wheezing or a whistling sound when breathing?
